calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Establishing Right To Property Deposited With County Treasurer And For Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Establishing Right To Property Deposited With County Treasurer And For Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Establishing Right To Property Deposited With County Treasurer And For Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Advanced From Jun-26-19 To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Establishing Right To Property Deposited With County Treasurer And For Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Jul-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Claire Johnson for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there are various notice issues, that it is not sure if they have been solved, that they could probably get past this and that it needs an order. Ms. Johnson provided a proposed order, stated that her office will be working Mr. Marinas to establish a special needs trust, and that the intention is to deposit the funds into the attorney client trust account to work with the law office that will be establishing the special needs trust. The Court noted that the order is asking to distribute the funds to Mr. Marinas, stated that once he has the funds it will limit their options and suggested continuing the matter to consult with someone to see if they want to amend their petition to request some other form of distribution. Ms. Johnson expressed concern stating that they are running on a deadline with the County Treasurer's Office, asked to have the matter passed to make a phone call and upon returning, requested that the matter be continued to amend her petition and come back with a different order. The Petition for Order Establishing Right to Property Deposited with the County Treasurer, etc. is continued to July 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
